waveProcess: 1. Spec the wave in tasks/todo.md (checkable steps sized as commit-able chunks) before writing code.
2. Implement step by step; run `npm.cmd run test:dev -- --runInBand --testPathPatterns dungeon-crawl` after each step.
3. End of wave: type-check + lint + full dev suite + the 10-test release suite. NO `npm run build` for game waves; NEVER add dev tests to CI (deliberate lean gate — see DOCS/START-HERE.md).
4. Gameplay/balance is validated by the OWNER'S PLAYTEST of the live dev build — do not write manual QA scripts; ship the wave end-to-end, then report and wait for playtest feedback.
5. Refresh this handoff (versionHistory entry, metric keys, test counts, awaitingPlaytest) and the tasks/todo.md review section at wave end. Validate this file still parses as JSON.
hardRules: Metric keys must exist in THREE places or progression silently drops them: syncExtendedData() + ArcadeHub.tsx GameEndData + dungeonCrawlAchievements.ts requirement.type.
The ESLint 1500-line guardrail is enforced culture: when a file crosses it, EXTRACT (precedents: HudRenderer, Combat, causes.ts, TownController, dungeonCrawlAchievements.ts).
Existing procedural SoundName palette only — never add sound names.
The generator stays pure in (seed, floor, opts). Anything hero-dependent (level pressure) applies at Enemy construction in the game, never inside dungeon/.
Characterization + monkey tests are the canary: update them CONSCIOUSLY (metric keys, monkey key list), never loosen them to pass.
nextTeamOnboarding.playtestKnobsLive: Everything numeric is data: data/constants.ts (feel), data/enemies.ts (bestiary + spawn weights), data/classes.ts + data/progression.ts + data/boons.ts (hero), data/relics.ts + data/scrolls.ts (run loot), data/quests.ts + data/gear.ts (town economy). Expect the owner to request knob turns after each playtest — those are one-line data edits.

roadToTheTabletop.mission: The owner's standing direction: keep adding AD&D 2e layers until the game plays like the tabletop brought to an arcade — inspiration from the DOCS library, fast combat untouched, no dice math on screen, every layer data-driven behind the existing recipes. Ordered by likely value; the owner's playtests set the actual order. Each is a wave: spec in tasks/todo.md, ship end-to-end, playtest, knob-turn.
layers: 1. Supabase save promotion — SHIPPED 2026-07-15 as Wave H (see versionHistory v5_waveH; owner still needs to apply supabase/004_game_saves.sql to the live project).
2. Lineages — SHIPPED 2026-07-15 as Wave I together with the title page (see versionHistory v6_waveI).
3. The fuller grimoire + martial techniques — SHIPPED 2026-07-16 as Wave J (see versionHistory v6_waveJ).
4. Thief skills: locked chests + disarmable traps (E-interact on a hazard with a thief = disarm chance) leaning on the existing hazard/urn/key systems; picks the thief identity up beyond backstab.
5. Reaction & morale (DMG): broken packs flee — a morale flag on EnemyConfig; monsters below pack strength or vs a leveled hero break and run (new behavior nuance, not a new verb: reuse wander-away).
6. Rest & wandering monsters (DMG): camp at a cleared floor's stairs to heal — but time feeds a wandering-spawn roll; risk/reward knob the tabletop lives on.

7. Town layers: TEMPLE (bless provision, curse removal, identify) and a single HIRELING follower (one companion, kit-driven like a boss summon but friendly). (The INN with rumor hooks SHIPPED in v5-G.)
8. Cursed & unidentified relics (Encyclopedia Magica): shrine relics may be unidentified with a curse risk; the temple identifies — pairs with layer 7.
9. A saga per biome + saga-aware town dressing (banners/palette shift while an arc is live); more Monstrous Compendium families per biome (newMonster recipe).
10. The planes endgame (Outer Planes appendix INSPIRATION): post-level-cap 'planar' quests — new biome palettes + families, tier-6 unique kits, the arcade's final frontier.
roadToTheTabletop.discipline: Every layer obeys the charter: original text only, generic archetypes, generator pure, metric keys in all four places, files under 1500 logical lines (extract along ownership seams — HudRenderer/Combat/TownController/TileMap precedents), existing SoundName palette, owner playtest as the gate.

v7_waveK_the_spectacle.summary: AAA GRAPHICS JUICE, VIEW LAYER ONLY — zero gameplay/generator/invariant changes; every magnitude in the new data/constants JUICE block. VALVE FIRST: rendering/lights.ts — the per-frame light gather extracted from onRender behind pure gatherLights(view), proven with zero test edits (orchestrator headroom restored). systems/Juice.ts: HIT-STOP — capped freeze timer (HITSTOP_MAX 0.3); the ONE seam is updatePlaying(this.juice.simDt(dt)); juice/shake/particles/lighting + banner timers tick on REAL dt at the top of onUpdate, and BaseGame accrues gameTime BEFORE onUpdate so timePlayedMs/metrics never see a freeze (TapDodge scaledDt precedent). Triggers: killEnemy 45ms / hitBoss 30ms / killBoss 220ms / player hurt 60ms / lightning + war-cry 50ms / enrage 80ms. FLASH-LIGHTS: transient decaying LightSources pushed after gatherLights (explosion booms, lightning, boss death, cracked walls, level-ups). CURTAIN: loadFloor/enterTownWorld stay synchronous and drop a 0.35s fade-off scrim (drawn at the top of onRenderUI). CombatHost += juice; DraftFlowHost += flashLight. PARTICLES v2: shape 'spark' (velocity-aligned streaks) / 'ring' (expanding stroke) / additive glow pass ('lighter') / shrink+drag; cap 400->600; sparks+rings at melee hits, kills, boss hits/death, explosions, relic grants, level-ups — all with jest-stubbed ctx verbs only (no gradients, no offscreen buffers). SHAKE v2: kick(dirX,dirY,strength) — fast-decaying directional impulse beside trauma (melee follow-through along the hit direction, hurt jolt, boss slam/death heave); the onRender lighting camX/camY compensation is untouched. TILERENDERER (all DERIVED from existing state — renderers stay stateless): enemy hit squash-stretch from the 0.15s flash timer (save/translate/scale around the sprite switch), dash ghost trail from dashTimer/dashDir (Player.dashDirX/Y made public for the view), sword lunge + bright inner arc from swingAnim, projectile motion trails from vx/vy, gold glint + heart-beat pickups, stairs rising motes, boss enrageFlash flare ring. HUD: hurt vignette from player.hitFlash + low-HP breathing vignette at hp<=2 (edge RECTS, gradient-free = jest-safe; HudState += hurtFlash/gameTime), combo POP from comboTimer freshness + white-hot blink at MAX_COMBO, heart-beat outline, boss-bar hit flash (boss.flash) + enrage-crossing flash (new optional renderBossBar params), banner rise-in on its existing fade envelope, victory/interlude/recap scrims fade in from their existing timers (save/globalAlpha/restore wrappers). ENRAGE MOMENT: hitBoss edge-detects the 35% crossing (wasEnraged) -> view-only Boss.enrageFlash = 1 (decays in Boss.update) + hitStop + flashLight + shake/kick + blood ring + death_cry 0.35 (existing palette). ZERO new metric keys/inputs/sounds/saves/achievements; characterization + monkey untouched. Suites 14 -> 15 (+juice.test.ts 8: unit simDt freeze/thaw/cap + flash-light lifecycle + curtain ramp; through the game: a combat-path kill freezes the sim ~2 frames then thaws, banner timers drain during a freeze, town never freezes, descend drops the curtain) = 190 dungeon tests; full dev 538/54.

v6_waveJ_the_fuller_grimoire_and_martial.summary: GRIMOIRE 6 -> 18 pages, ALL FOUR classes. THE INSIGHT: the Wave D pipeline is fully generic on classId, so fighter/thief TECHNIQUES are simply SpellDefs with a martial classId — learning, SavedHero.spells persistence + class-legal sanitize, V/G, cooldowns, HUD pip and sheet all rode with ZERO pipeline code. LEVEL BANDS: SpellDef.minLevel (existing six = 1 -> zero behavior change; all new pages 4/6/8); the ONE gate line lives in ProgressionController.draftChoices (page drafts when hero.level + 1 >= minLevel). NEW PAGES (2e-inspired generic archetypes, original text, existing Combat verbs + SoundName palette only): mage MAGIC MISSILE (3 homing player daggers fanned about facing, dmg 1 + INT) / WEB (frostNova generalized with center+colors — roots the pack AHEAD) / LIGHTNING (heavy single-target wound on the nearest foe in 260px, 4 + INT, hitBoss fallback); cleric SPIRIT HAMMER (one strong homing dagger, dmg 2) / PRAYER (strength + stoneskin together) / FLAME STRIKE (player-sourced bomb dropped on nearestEnemyTo, facing-front fallback, 3 + INT); fighter WAR CRY (stun 0.8 + shove in 150px) / SECOND WIND (flat 2hp heal — martial, no WIS fold) / SUNDER (piercing blade projectile at swordDamage + 1 — STR folds free); thief SMOKE BOMB (startHide + brief stun bloom) / FAN OF KNIVES (8 daggers all directions at daggerDamage, no ammo cost) / VENOM EDGE (strength buff). Wording: spellNoun(classId) helper — draft-card footer 'SPELL/TECHNIQUE — press V', sheet header GRIMOIRE/TECHNIQUES, martial empty-book line now invites leveling. ZERO new metric keys/inputs/sounds/save fields — spells_learned/spells_cast deliberately count techniques; characterization + monkey untouched. Combat ~1030 raw lines (no extraction needed). Tests 176 -> 182 (spells.test 7 -> 13): 18-page contract + per-class counts, band shape (casters keep exactly 3 day-one pages, martial bands exactly [4,6,8]), spellNoun, band gating both ways at the draft (empty at level 2, exactly the band-4 page reaching 4), martial cast through the game (SECOND WIND heals + counts spells_cast + cools), FAN OF KNIVES 8 projectiles no ammo, sanitize drops a cross-class technique; conscious comment update in progression.test (level-1 thief draft stays training-only BECAUSE bands start at 4).

SavedHero.lineage additive; applyLineage called beside applyKit at BOTH arm sites (DraftFlow.enterTown + QuestDirector.depart). Sheet identity reads 'icon LINEAGE CLASS · LEVEL n'; roster card gains the lineage line; forge banner 'LINEAGE CLASS — THE QUEST BOARD AWAITS'. ZERO new metric keys/inputs/sounds — characterization + monkey untouched. Suites 13->14 (+lineages.test.ts 12: data contract, sanitize/clamp, demihuman forge round-trip, FAR HORIZONS vs elf roll, veteran fallback, all three Player passives, title-holds/digit-fall-through/resume-skips flows, DEFAULT_KIT pin) = 176 dungeon tests; conscious updates: run-start flows in classes/town/sagas/spells/progression walk title->roster->bloodline, stats forge-total pin includes the human bonus, progression XP derives from the forged hero's WIS delta (town.test CHA precedent).

v5_waveH_the_cloud_chronicle.summary: PLATFORM WAVE — zero dungeon-crawl game-code changes; CharacterStore still owns the localStorage roster and the platform mirrors it. SQL: supabase/004_game_saves.sql (non-destructive; mirrored into 001_init.sql for clean installs; runbook updated) — game_saves(user_id FK profiles, game_id, payload jsonb, updated_at, PK(user_id,game_id)), RLS select-own ONLY (no write policies), upsert_game_save(_game_id,_payload) SECURITY DEFINER RPC pinned to auth.uid() with game-id/64KB/object-shape guards, execute granted to authenticated + service_role, revoked from anon/public; supabase.types.ts hand-aligned. CLIENT: SupabaseArcadeService.fetchGameSave (RLS select) + upsertGameSave (RPC, returns server updated_at); src/services/GameSaveSync.ts — SYNCED_GAME_SAVES registry (dungeon-crawl today, one line per future game), sidecar meta hacktivate-game-save-sync-v1:<owner>:<gameId> {lastSyncedHash (djb2), serverUpdatedAt, guestMigrationResolved}, reconcile decision table (no-server+local -> first-promotion push; server+no-local -> adopt; only-local-changed -> push; only-server-changed -> adopt; BOTH changed -> SERVER WINS; no-server+no-local+guest-save -> one-time migration offer), pushIfChanged by hash compare, all storage/service access fail-soft (warn + self-heal next trigger; pushes are state-idempotent so they NEVER ride the trusted outbox). WIRING: useArcadeSupabaseSync owns a per-owner GameSaveSync — reconcile runs ONCE per signed-in owner AFTER account hydration (owner key already = user.id), pagehide best-effort push, exposes pushGameSave/guestSaveOffers/resolveGuestSaveOffer; ArcadeHub pushes at handleGameEnd + handleBackToHub and renders the guest-offer banner (Bring it with me / Leave it) beside the sync-status banner. Saves are STATE, never currency. Tests +17 in 3 platform suites (GameSaveSync 11: full decision table, guest flow, failure self-heal, corrupt-payload guard; service contract 3; hook 3: reconcile-once, offer resolve, scoped push) = full dev suite 512/512 (52 suites); dungeon suites untouched at 164. Rode on the 2026-07-14 platform fix that made BaseGame timePlayedMs dt-accumulated (the outbox-poisoning wall-clock bug).

ONE new metric items_found in all four places + 1 achievement (33 total; 37 metric keys); monkey += KeyI. Suites 11->12 (+items.test.ts 15: data contract, merging, weighted drops, satchel cap, victory banking + dupe gold, death-writes-nothing + lostCount, town-mode swap, sanitize, Player folds incl. the pinned 5-damage composition, equippedStatDeltas boundaries) = 150 dungeon tests.

v5_waveE_the_six_scores.summary: SCORES: data/stats.ts — StatId str/dex/con/int/wis/cha, STAT_BASES per class (2e-flavored arrays, each sums 72; favored pair deliberately ODD so the first milestone bump crosses a modifier boundary), STAT_FAVORED, STAT_TUNING (every magnitude), statMod = floor((score-10)/2), statModDeltas (gameplay reads the DELTA vs class base — flat base = zero deltas = the pre-stats game EXACTLY; deltas floor at 0), rollStatScores (base + 2 seeded variance points at forge, AFTER the name pick so name rng order is pinned), isStatMilestone (3/6/9). PERSISTENCE: SavedHero.scores (additive, no version bump; sanitize clamps [classBase, 18], absent field -> flat base so veterans keep their playtested feel; field is `scores`, NEVER confuse with hero.stats the record). FOLDS: Player.statMods + applyProgression 4th arg + setStatMods (mid-run bump heals the CON delta) — STR->swordDamage+meleeKnockback, DEX->speed+dashCooldownFull (new helper, both dash sites), CON->maxHp (CON_HP 2), WIS->heartHealBonus; Player.spellCooldownFull applies INT inside startSpellCooldown (HUD pip divides by it); Combat: INT damage on burning-hands/fireball, WIS on cure/bless; ProgressionController.grantXp x(1+0.05·wis); game: hagglerPrice += cha·0.05, openVictory rewardGold x(1+0.05·cha) (ledger shows the talked-up number). DRAFT: DraftPick += {kind:'stat'}; milestone levels lead draftChoices with favored cards (<18) before the shuffled pool; confirmLevelUp +1 clamp 18, NO session counter (boons_chosen stays boons); renderBoonDraft three-way def lookup. SHEET: six-cell score strip (score + modifier, favored in class color) under the XP bar; columns shifted 170->196. GUARDRAIL VALVE: progression/DraftFlow.ts extracted FIRST (class select + level-up draft flow behind a narrow host; proven pure — all 113 pre-wave tests green with zero edits) putting DungeonCrawlGame back under 1500. ZERO new metric keys/inputs/sounds — characterization contract + monkey untouched. Suites 10->11 (+stats.test.ts 22: data contract, modifier table, delta floor, seeded forge roll, milestones, sanitize clamps, round-trip, draft cards, Player fold siblings of the UNCHANGED maxHp===18 zero-delta pin, WIS xp) = 135 dungeon tests; town victory test consciously derives reward gold from the forged hero's CHA delta (forge roll is live rng there).

v4_waveD_grimoire_manual_sheet.summary: GRIMOIRE: data/spells.ts — six class-gated spells (mage: burning-hands short player blast / frost-ray radius stun / blink teleport+i-frames via host.findOpenSpotNear; cleric: cure-wounds heal / bless haste+1hp / sanctuary stoneskin+invuln; scholar boon deepens cure+sanctuary). Caster level-up drafts mix unlearned spells among boon cards via ProgressionController.DraftPick (draftChoices/confirmLevelUp replaced boonChoices; martial drafts unchanged); learned spells persist as additive SavedHero.spells (class-legal sanitize). V casts the readied spell, G cycles (banner), per-spell cooldowns tick on Player (spellCooldown/startSpellCooldown); HUD spell pip; effects in Combat.castSpell reuse the scroll library (frostNova parameterized). MANUAL: five monsters on existing behavior verbs — salamander (ember 5+, ranged), bone-archer (bone 4+, ranged, undead), drowned-one (sunken 5+, chase, undead), ember-wight (ash 6+, armored — blocks frontal free via behavior, undead), gargoyle (core row ALL biomes 8+, flit). Ranged configs carry boltCause -> Projectile.cause so recaps name the shooter (EnemyUpdateContext.fireBolt += cause); 5 DeathCauses + original labels/hints; undead set now 8. SHEET: Tab toggles a 'sheet' state from playing/town (world frozen; InputManager preventDefaults keydown so Tab is safe); HudRenderer.renderCharacterSheet = identity/XP/record/treasury/gear/sagas/training/grimoire. Guardrail valve: findOpenSpotNear -> TileMap (nullable, host binding keeps the player-pos fallback); ability dispatch (castAbility), hazard damage (updateHazards), nearestEnemyTo, shop product effects (applyShopPurchase) and scroll pickup (collectScroll) -> Combat (CombatHost += hazards/showBanner/grantRelic). Metrics spells_learned/spells_cast (34->36); 2 achievements (32 total); suites 9->10 (+spells.test 7, +1 bestiary gate; monkey keys += KeyV/KeyG/Tab) = 113 dungeon tests.

v4_waveC_sagas_and_secrets.summary: SAGAS: data/sagas.ts — THE PALE PROCESSION (3 bone chapters, unique finale THE GRAVE WARDEN) + THE UNDYING EMBER (4 chapters ember->sunken->ash, unique finale THE CINDER REGENT with the game's largest payouts 800g/1000xp). Chapters = saga-flagged QuestDef entries (QUESTS grew 5->12; STANDALONE_QUEST_IDS keeps the classic board at 5); board gains an Up/Down SAGA page (progress pips, departs on the hero's current chapter; finales relivable, progress never rewinds). Unique kits live in UNIQUE_BOSS_KITS BESIDE the rotation (bossKitById; QuestDef.bossKitId -> Boss ctor override) so classic tiers roll unchanged. Interludes (<60 words, original) play via a new 'interlude' state between victory and town; epilogue caps the arc. Per-hero `sagas` chapter map = additive SavedHero field (sanitize clamp, no version bump); ProgressionController.advanceSaga is replay-proof. SECRET ROOMS: generator carves 0-2 sealed pockets into untouched rock per floor (kind 'secret', kept OFF plan.rooms so all room passes + stairs/key BFS invariants hold by construction), sealed by Tile.CrackedWall (solid via the one isSolidTile line; cracked-wall TileRenderer case; minimap free). ONLY player-sourced booms crack seals (Combat blast scan -> host.crackWall; bomber bombs stay 'enemy'). Stock: gold x3-5 + urns + shrine-or-scroll; ~half host a NEST (floor/biome-gated pack pre-rolled in FloorPlan.secrets, spawned by the GAME on entry so level pressure stays out of dungeon/; clear pays run-wallet gold 25+10/floor). systems/SecretRooms.ts tracks reveal/trigger/clear behind a narrow host. Guardrail extraction: recap/victory row assembly + shop-item naming + slim HudState -> HudRenderer; town overlay routing -> TownController.renderOverlay; projectile drawing -> TileRenderer.drawProjectiles (orchestrator back under 1500). Metrics sagas_completed/secrets_found/nests_cleared (31->34 keys); 4 achievements (30 total); suites 7->9 (sagas.test 5, secrets.test 2, +2 generator, +1 store clamp) = 105 dungeon tests.

v1.summary: Core game: seeded rooms-and-corridors floors, torch lighting + fog-of-war minimap, sword/dagger combat, 6 enemy archetypes + mimics, relic draft on descent, Ember Guardian boss every 3rd floor, combo/depth scoring, death recap, full arcade wiring (18th playable game).

v2_depthPass.summary: Dodge dash with i-frames; elite monster modifiers (frenzied/bulwark/volatile/gilded); bomber + wraith enemies; 3-boss rotating roster; 4 floor biomes; spike/vent hazards; destructible urns; merchant shop with spendable gold balance; 4 new relics; 6 new achievements; HudRenderer extracted.

v3_wave1_classes.summary: Four playable classes (Fighter/Thief/Cleric/Mage) picked on a run-start class-select screen (relic-draft pattern, Digit1-4 direct). Each = stat kit + weapon feel + signature Q/L ability (Cleave / Hide in Shadows / Turn Undead / Fireball). Passives: backstab 2x from behind, thief +25% gold drops, cleric heal bonus, mage homing mana bolts with regen. systems/Combat.ts extracted from the orchestrator (killEnemy/hitBoss/explosions/shockwaves + ability effects) for guardrail headroom. 5 metric keys + 5 achievements.

v3_wave2_bestiary.summary: Per-biome monster families (7 new types + 1 mini, ALL reusing existing behavior verbs): ember=fire-beetle (emits real torchlight), bone=zombie+ghoul, sunken=deep-ooze (splits)+lizardman, ash=shade (through walls)+cinder-hound. spawnWeightsForFloor(floor, biomeId) with v2 gates intact; splitsInto generalizes slime division; undead tags feed Turn Undead; 7 DeathCauses; undead_slain + unique_slain metrics + 2 achievements.

v4_waveA1_roster_and_waveB_town.summary: A.1 ROSTER: save v2 = one persistent hero per class (v1 single-hero saves migrate into their slot with stats); every run opens on the hero select (cards show 'NAME · LV n' or UNPROVEN); retire clears only the fallen hero's slot; restart returns to the roster. B LASTLIGHT: session = roster pick -> town (hand-built 26x18 map in town/TownController.ts, synthetic FloorPlan the game loads like a floor; warm TOWN_PALETTE) -> quest board/gate departs on a QUEST (data/quests.ts: 4 authored + Endless; fresh seed per expedition; quest pins biome via generator FloorOpts {forceBoss, biomeId} — omitted opts reproduce classic rules bit-for-bit; boss ONLY on the final floor, tier from the quest) -> stairs after the final boss = VICTORY overlay: carried goldBalance + rewardGold bank into hero.gold, rewardXp granted, stats.victories++, return to town SAME session. Death still recap->endGame (hero endures, carried gold lost, banked safe). BLACKSMITH: 4 permanent gear tracks x3 tiers (data/gear.ts, banked gold, saved per hero, folded in Player like boons). ALCHEMIST: one-expedition provisions (field-scroll/bandolier/blessed-candle) consumed at the gate. HUD gold shows the treasury in town, the run wallet below. Line-budget enforcement: boss director (updateBoss/pickTeleportSpot) + castScroll effects moved into systems/Combat (host += addProjectile/revealMap); draft nav consolidated. Metrics quests_completed + gold_banked; 3 achievements; town.test.ts (10).

v4_waveA_character.summary: PERSISTENT HERO per arcade account: class pick forges a character (auto-named from HERO_NAMES via seeded rng) saved as versioned JSON under localStorage key dungeon-crawl-save:<ownerId> (owner from hacktivate-session-owner, fallback guest; validated on load, silent try/catch everywhere). 2e-flavored XP per monster (EnemyConfig.xp; elites x3, bosses +200), LEVEL_CURVE to cap 10, per-class hit-die LEVEL_GAINS (fighter/cleric 20hp, thief 15hp+speed, mage 13hp+mana), mid-run level-ups open a 'levelUp' boon draft (10 persistent proficiency boons with maxStacks). Death banks everything (recordDeath); hold R on the recap to retire. Level pressure (enemy hp x 1+0.05/level, cap 1.45) keeps floor 1 honest — applied at Enemy construction, generator untouched. HUD gains LV + XP bar. RESTART SEMANTICS CHANGED: restart resumes the saved hero (classes.test updated deliberately). New: data/progression.ts, data/boons.ts, data/causes.ts (extraction), persistence/CharacterStore.ts, progression/ProgressionController.ts, __tests__/progression.test.ts (18). 4 metric keys + 4 achievements.

v3_wave3_loot.summary: Vaults of the Magica: relic pool 12 -> 18 (Ring of Renewal hp regen / War Bracers ability CD / Grave Ward vs undead / Ogre Gauntlets knockback / Blur Cloak dodge / Bottomless Quiver dagger regen) + UNIDENTIFIED SCROLLS: one satchel slot, read with F/O; identity rolls from the live rng at pickup (generator stays pure). Five scrolls: Flame (player blast), Frost (stuns all in sight — reuses Enemy.stunned), Healing, Shielding (stoneskin + invuln), Revelation (reveals minimap). Found on floors (~50%), in urns, and as a 35g shop mystery. BombInFlight refactored to carry an explicit boom payload (bomber/fireball/scroll = one path). scrolls_used metric + 1 achievement. achievements.ts crossed the 1500-line guardrail and its 26 dungeon entries were extracted to src/data/dungeonCrawlAchievements.ts.

architecture.overview: One BaseGame subclass orchestrates pure/seeded generation, data-driven entities, stateless renderers, and stateful Combat + SecretRooms systems behind narrow host interfaces. Every file stays under the 1500-logical-line ESLint guardrail (Wave C valve: view assembly lives with the views — recap/victory rows in HudRenderer, town overlay routing in TownController, projectiles in TileRenderer).

files.DungeonCrawlGame.ts: Orchestrator: state machine (classSelect/playing/relic/recap), input edges, ability dispatch, scoring, metrics sync, service calls. Combat resolution and screen-space drawing are delegated.
files.data/constants.ts: ALL tuning: player/dash, combat/combo, pickups, shop prices, hazard cycle, explosion fuses, shockwave, lighting, overlay timing, BIOMES palette table + biomeForFloor().
files.data/classes.ts: v3 — ClassId/ClassKit/ClassDef, CLASSES (4 kits incl. tunic/trim sprite colors + ability blurbs), DEFAULT_KIT (reproduces the pre-v3 hero exactly; active until the pick), CLASS_TUNING (ability numbers).
files.data/sagas.ts: v4 Wave C — SagaId/SagaDef/SAGAS (chapters = ordered QuestIds, interludes 1:1 with chapters, last = epilogue) + pure helpers sagaChapterForQuest/chaptersDone/currentChapter. v5 Wave G: 3 arcs — THE LAST PAGE is meta:true, hidden until both founding sagas are TOLD via the pure sagaTold/metaUnlocked/allSagasTold/visibleSagaIds helpers (board, sheet and storyStage all read them). Module-load guard pins interlude pairing + saga flags.
files.data/npcs.ts: v5 Wave G — the townsfolk of THE LAST LANTERN: NpcId/NpcDef/NPCS (5 named originals with icon/color/title) + rumor pools per StoryStage + the PURE STATELESS storyStage(hero) (level + saga progress -> arrival/delving/the-page/aftermath; magnitudes in NPC_TUNING; no save field). Rumors roll from the game's live rng via TownCtx.pickRumor.
files.progression/QuestDirector.ts: v5 Wave G — the quest expedition lifecycle extracted from the orchestrator: depart (re-arm hero -> provisions -> save; stages the DM briefing), openVictory (banking, saga advance, ledger; clears stale briefings), updateVictory/updateInterlude (PendingInterlude.onDismiss 'town'|'descend' — briefings descend via loadFloor at dismiss), arrive (banner + gate level-up). DraftFlow conventions: narrow host, update methods return GameState|null, metric counters stay in the game's callbacks.
files.data/lineages.ts: Wave I — the four bloodlines: LineageId/LineageDef/LINEAGES (HUMAN deliberately first = the neutral card), LINEAGE_TUNING (human forge bonus, elf sheath, halfling escape), asLineageId (sanitize fallback), applyLineageNudge (forge fold, clamped). Passives consumed in Player; the pick lives in DraftFlow/HudRenderer.
files.data/spells.ts: v4 Wave D, deepened v6 Wave J — SpellId/SpellDef/SPELLS (18 pages, class-gated via classId: 6 mage + 6 cleric + 3 fighter + 3 thief TECHNIQUES) + minLevel level bands (existing six = 1, new pages 4/6/8) + spellsForClass + spellNoun (SPELL vs TECHNIQUE wording) + SPELL_TUNING. Pure data; effects in Combat.castSpell; learning rides the level-up draft (band-gated in draftChoices); V casts / G cycles.
files.data/stats.ts: v5 Wave E — the six ability scores: StatId/StatDef/STATS, STAT_BASES per class + STAT_FAVORED + STAT_TUNING, and the pure functions statMod/zeroStatMods/statModDeltas (deltas vs class base, floored at 0)/rollStatScores (seeded forge variance)/isStatMilestone/withStatBonus (Wave F equipment overlay). Gameplay folds read DELTAS so the flat base reproduces the pre-stats game exactly.
files.data/items.ts: v5 Wave F — 12 findable equipment pieces across weapon/armor/trinket slots with rarities and flat additive ItemEffects (+statBonus for effective scores); ITEM_TUNING (caps, dupe gold, drop chances/weights) + itemsOfRarity/rollItemDrop/bossItemWeights/mergeItemEffects.
files.systems/Inventory.ts: v5 Wave F — the run satchel + worn set + banking rules behind InventoryHost: tryCollect (full leaves the find), wear/swap (town mode edits the SAVED hero directly), bankOnVictory (the ONLY moment finds persist; dupes/overflow -> gold), lostCount (recap). Browse UI state (index/list) the HUD renders from.
files.systems/PickupResolver.ts: v5 Wave F — floor-loot resolution extracted from the orchestrator: the collect-pickup switch, grantRelic, and the keyed treasure-room doors. Mechanics here; counters/metrics stay in the game's host callbacks (onGold/onPotionUsed/onKeyUsed/onRelicCollected, collectScroll -> Combat, collectItem -> Inventory).
files.progression/DraftFlow.ts: v5 Wave E — the run-start class/hero select and the level-up card draft (boons/spells/milestone stat bumps), extracted from the orchestrator behind DraftFlowHost. Owns classIndex/choices/index/returnState (HUD renders from them); update methods return the next GameState or null and the game assigns.
files.systems/SecretRooms.ts: v4 Wave C — runtime secret-room state (revealed/nest triggered/cleared) behind SecretRoomsHost (spawnNest/showBanner/playSound/grantNestReward/onSecretFound/onNestCleared). resetFor(plan.secrets) per floor; update(playerX, playerY) each playing frame.
files.data/enemies.ts: 17 enemy configs (data-driven AI params, undead + splitsInto tags), elite trait table + spawn-chance ramp, spawnWeightsForFloor(floor, biomeId) = common core with v2 floor gates + per-biome family rows, per-room enemy budget, BOSS baseline.
files.data/bosses.ts: The three rotating Guardian kits + bossKitForTier(), PLUS UNIQUE_BOSS_KITS (grave-warden, cinder-regent, and v5 Wave G's underscribe) outside the rotation + bossKitById() — saga finales pin theirs via QuestDef.bossKitId (Boss ctor optional kit override).
files.data/relics.ts: 18 relic definitions + RELIC_TUNING. Relics are stacking counters read by Player.ts (a few consumed in Combat/damagePlayer: grave-ward, blur-cloak).
files.data/scrolls.ts: v3 wave 3 — ScrollId/ScrollDef/SCROLLS/ALL_SCROLL_IDS + SCROLL_TUNING. Pure data; effects dispatch in DungeonCrawlGame.castScroll + Combat.
files.dungeon/rng.ts: Mulberry32 seeded PRNG. Generator and relic drafts fully deterministic per (seed, floor).
files.dungeon/DungeonGenerator.ts: Pure seeded floor generator. pickWeighted derives biome purely from floor number. Exports isReachable (BFS) used by tests.
files.entities/Player.ts: Movement, sword arc, dagger throw, dash, hearts, relic stacking, potion buffs, phoenix revive. v3: `kit` field drives melee range/arc/cooldown/knockback, speed, dagger cap/homing/regen; applyKit(); tryAbility() + abilityCooldownFrac(); startHide() (rides invuln); backstab/heal/gold multipliers read by Combat/game.
files.entities/Enemy.ts: One class interprets all archetypes from config. v3: `stunned` timer (Turn Undead — frozen, no touch damage), ctx.playerHidden drops+blocks aggro every frame (thief hide).
files.entities/Boss.ts: Kit-driven phase machine; enrage under 35% HP.
files.entities/Projectile.ts: Bolts + daggers; homing steer reused by mage mana bolts (game passes nearest-enemy target for player daggers, player pos for hostile bolts).
files.entities/Urn.ts: Destructible prop; Combat rolls loot on break.
files.systems/Combat.ts: v3 — extracted combat resolution: hitEnemy (knight block, backstab), woundEnemy, killEnemy (drops, splitsInto division, host stat callbacks), breakUrn, hitBoss/killBoss, bombs/staged explosions (source: enemy|player — player booms never hurt the player)/shockwaves + their rendering, ability effects (cleave/turnUndead/spawnFireball). Reaches the run ONLY via the CombatHost interface (accessor functions because the game reassigns arrays per floor). Exports DeathCause + causeForEnemy.
files.systems/Lighting.ts: Offscreen darkness buffer + radial holes. SELF-DISABLES without createRadialGradient (jest) — keep this guard.
files.systems/Juice.ts: Wave K — THE SPECTACLE's stateful kit: capped hit-stop freeze (simDt wraps ONLY the updatePlaying call), transient flash-lights appended to the darkness gather, floor-entry curtain scrim. Ticks on REAL dt beside shake/particles/lighting; reset + startCurtain at loadFloor/enterTownWorld; every magnitude in constants JUICE.
files.rendering/lights.ts: Wave K — pure gatherLights(view): the per-frame LightSource assembly (player torch, wall torches, fire-beetles, unlocked stairs, merchants, town fixtures, boss) extracted from onRender; juice flash-lights are pushed after it.
files.systems/ParticleSystem.ts: Capped chunky-pixel particles (600). Wave K: spark streaks + expanding rings + an additive glow pass, shrink/drag; sparks()/ring() beside burst/spray/ember. Jest-stubbed ctx verbs only.
files.systems/ScreenShake.ts: Trauma-squared shake. Wave K: kick(dirX,dirY,strength) — a fast-decaying directional impulse added to the jitter in getOffset().
files.rendering/TileRenderer.ts: All world-space drawing. v3: per-class player sprite (tunic/trim from CLASSES + silhouette: thief low hood, cleric mace+sigil, mage hat+staff, fighter broad sword; hidden = 0.4 alpha), stun halo, 5 new monster draws + blob/wraith paths parameterized by config colors (oozes/shade ride them free).
files.rendering/HudRenderer.ts: All screen-space chrome. v3: renderClassSelect (4 cards), ability cooldown pip (Q + class icon) under the dash pip. Pure view — receives explicit state.

arcadeWiring.registry: src/games/registry.ts — dynamic import of DungeonCrawlGame (18th game).
arcadeWiring.music: GAME_TRACK_MAPPING: primary epic_tension, secondary epic_heroic. Game drives setMusicIntensity (explore 0.5 / combat 0.7 / boss 0.85 / enrage 0.95) + stingers.
arcadeWiring.sounds: Existing procedural SoundName palette ONLY — v3 added no new sounds (class confirm=powerup, cleave=sword_swing+collision, turn undead=unlock, fireball=whoosh+explosion, hide=whoosh).
arcadeWiring.gameEndData: src/components/arcade/ArcadeHub.tsx GameEndData lists all 24 dungeon metric keys as optional numbers.
arcadeWiring.achievements: src/data/dungeonCrawlAchievements.ts — 34 dungeon-crawl achievements (extracted from achievements.ts, which spreads them in). requirement.type strings MUST exactly match extendedGameData keys.
arcadeWiring.trustedProgression: No custom server work: src/lib/trustedProgression.ts derives unlocks from session metrics.

metricsContract.note: extendedGameData is rebuilt every frame in syncExtendedData() and frozen at death. Keys double as achievement requirement types. Adding a stat = add the field, sync it, add the optional key to ArcadeHub GameEndData, pin it in the characterization test.
metricsContract.v3Semantics: <class>_depth = floor reached this run IF that class was picked, else 0 (enables 'reach floor N as X' achievements through the plain threshold path). unique_slain = distinct monster config ids killed this run.

controls.titlePage: Wave I — every session opens on THE EMBER DEPTHS; Space/Enter turns the page to the roster
controls.classSelect: Left/Right + Space, or 1/2/3/4 direct (after the title; world renders behind the overlay)
controls.lineageSelect: Wave I — forging a NEW hero only: Left/Right + Space, or 1-4 direct (digits are release-armed so the class-pick digit can't fall through); returning heroes skip it
controls.sword: Space / J (arc melee; kit-driven range/arc/cooldown; knights block frontal)
controls.dagger: X / K (ammo; mage: homing mana bolts that regen)
controls.ability: Q / L (signature class ability; cooldown pip under dash)
controls.readScroll: F / O (reads the held scroll; satchel holds one)
controls.levelUpDraft: Left/Right + Space, or 1-3 direct (pauses play like the relic draft)
controls.retireHero: hold R for 1.5s on the death recap (past the input lockout)
controls.town: walk with move keys; E opens the board/smith/alchemist/inn in reach (E again closes); on the board SPACE departs at once; Up/Down flips CONTRACTS <-> SAGAS pages; the gate also opens the board
controls.theInn: v5 Wave G — E at THE LAST LANTERN opens the bar; ←→ picks a patron, SPACE asks for another rumor, E steps away
controls.interludeDismiss: Space/Enter after a 1.0s lockout (OVERLAY.INTERLUDE_LOCKOUT); v5 Wave G — the same overlay carries DM briefings at departure (dismiss descends onto floor 1)
controls.castSpell: V (readied spell; per-spell cooldown pip on the HUD)
controls.cycleSpell: G (readies the next learned spell; banner confirms)
controls.characterSheet: Tab (from play or town; world freezes; Tab closes)
controls.thePack: I (from play or town; world freezes; ↑↓ browse, SPACE wears, I closes — town side edits the saved stash/equipment, run side the satchel)

gameplaySystems.classes: fighter (4 hearts, 120° arc, Cleave 6s) / thief (+14% speed, 8 daggers, +25% gold, 2x backstab from behind or shadows, Hide 1.5s per 10s) / cleric (mace +1dmg slow heavy, hearts heal +1, Turn Undead 8s: 2dmg+1s stun to undead in 140px, shoves the living) / mage (2 hearts, weak staff, homing bolts cap 6 regen 1/4s, Fireball 8s: player-sourced 56px boom). All tuning in data/classes.ts.
gameplaySystems.lineages: Wave I — chosen once at the forge, saved on the hero: HUMAN/THE UNBOUND (+1 forge variance point, forge-time only), DWARF/STONEBLOOD (+1 CON, first trap each floor bites nothing), ELF/STARLIT (+1 DEX, +1 dagger sheath), HALFLING/HEARTHLUCK (+1 CHA, once-per-expedition death escape after phoenix/survivor). Nudges are single points folded into the forge roll (texture, never a rebalance); all knobs in data/lineages.ts.
gameplaySystems.abilityScores: v5 Wave E — STR/DEX/CON/INT/WIS/CHA on every hero: class base array (fighter STR17/CON15, thief DEX17/CHA13, cleric WIS17/CON13, mage INT17/DEX13; each sums 72) + 2 seeded variance points at forge. Gameplay reads modifier DELTAS vs the base (flat base = today's feel; veterans default to it). Folds per delta point: STR +1 dmg/+20 knockback, DEX +3% speed/dash cd x0.92, CON +2 hp, INT spell cd x0.9/+1 spell dmg, WIS +1 heal/xp x1.05, CHA shop -5%/quest gold +5%. Milestone levels 3/6/9 lead the level-up draft with the favored pair (odd bases — first bump always crosses a mod boundary). Sheet strip shows score + modifier.
gameplaySystems.bestiary: Biome families on top of the shared core: ember=fire-beetle (emits LightSource r70), bone=zombie (slow hp5) + ghoul (fast, floor 5+), sunken=deep-ooze (splits to 2 minis) + lizardman (floor 3+), ash=shade (through walls, undead) + cinder-hound (speed 105) (floor 4+). Undead set for Turn Undead: skeleton, wraith, zombie, ghoul, shade. Biome ambient floors in the 4-cycle with bosses every 3rd: ember 1/5, bone 2/10, sunken 7/11, ash 4/8.
gameplaySystems.scrolls: One satchel slot; found unidentified (floor ~50%, urn loot band, shop 35g); identity rolls from the LIVE rng at pickup + banner; F/O reads it. flame=player blast r72 dmg3 / frost=stun all in 380px for 2.5s / healing=4hp / shielding=stoneskin+1s invuln / revelation=reveal minimap. Full satchel leaves floor scrolls in place; a bought scroll replaces the held one.
gameplaySystems.sagas: Three arcs on the board's saga page: PALE PROCESSION (bone, minLevel 2/3/4, finale GRAVE WARDEN t3 x1.15hp), UNDYING EMBER (ember->sunken->ash, minLevel 6-9, finale CINDER REGENT t5 x1.25hp), and — v5 Wave G, hidden until BOTH are TOLD — THE LAST PAGE (bone->sunken->ash, minLevel 9/10/10, finale THE UNDERSCRIBE t6 x1.35hp, the reward crown 1000g/1200xp). Chapter N+1 unlocks when N completes for THAT hero; interlude after each chapter victory, epilogue after the finale; completed sagas may relive the finale (progress frozen).
gameplaySystems.theDM: v5 Wave G — every departure opens on the quest's DM briefing (QuestDef.intro, original prose) via the interlude overlay; dismiss descends. THE LAST LANTERN inn hosts five townsfolk whose rumors follow the hero's STORY STAGE (pure stateless storyStage: arrival/delving/the-page/aftermath) — hints ride existing systems, teasers point at the next chapter, and once both sagas are told every voice bends toward the missing last page.
gameplaySystems.theGrimoire: v6 Wave J — 18 persistent pages learned at level-up, ALL classes: mage/cleric 6 spells each, fighter/thief 3 TECHNIQUES each (same pipeline, different noun). minLevel bands gate the draft (1 for the Wave D six, 4/6/8 for everything new) so deep heroes draft deeper magic and fresh heroes play exactly as before. V casts the readied page, G cycles; per-page cooldowns on Player (INT shortens via the delta fold); effects in Combat.castSpell reuse existing verbs only.
gameplaySystems.secretRooms: 0-2 per non-boss floor, sealed by a CrackedWall only PLAYER booms open (mage fireball, flame scroll). Dark (no torches), stocked with gold + urns + shrine-or-scroll; ~50% host a nest that stirs on entry — clear the spawned pack for run-wallet gold (SECRETS.NEST_REWARD_BASE + PER_FLOOR). All knobs in data/constants.ts SECRETS.
gameplaySystems.coreLoop: Pick class -> explore floor -> fight -> loot -> optional treasure room (key) -> optional shop -> stairs -> relic draft -> descend. Boss arena every 3rd floor.
gameplaySystems.economyRule: CRITICAL: gold is two numbers. `pickups` (BaseGame) is CUMULATIVE arcade economy — never decrement. `goldBalance` is the run wallet the shop drains. Thief gold bonus multiplies drop COUNT only.
gameplaySystems.scoring: kill score x combo (x1-x5) x depth multiplier; gold +15; +10/room; floor-clear 150+75*floor; boss bonus 1000.
gameplaySystems.bosses: Tier = floor/3. Ember Guardian / Bone Colossus / Hollow King rotation with HP_PER_TIER scaling.
gameplaySystems.relicDraftDeterminism: Stair drafts seeded from (runSeed ^ floor*0x85ebca6b). Shrine/shop relics use the live rng. Class choice is user input — no rng.

doNotBreak: All player damage funnels through damagePlayer(cause). New damage sources need: DeathCause member (systems/Combat.ts) + CAUSE_LABELS + CAUSE_HINTS entries (TS errors if you forget).
Dash AND thief-hide safety ride Player.invuln — never add a damage path that ignores invuln.
Never decrement BaseGame.pickups. Spend from goldBalance only.
Generator stays pure + seeded: no Math.random inside dungeon/. Biome for spawns derives from floor number.
Stairs must be reachable WITHOUT the key (BFS-verified lockRoom).
Every service call optional-chained (this.services?.audio?.playSound?.(...)).
Lighting.ts keeps its createRadialGradient feature-detect no-op.
extendedGameData keys == achievement requirement.type strings; new keys go in syncExtendedData + GameEndData + characterization test, all three.
Input uses edge detection (was-flags updated at END of onUpdate).
Keep every file under the 1500-line guardrail; grow by extracting (HudRenderer, Combat are the precedents).
player-sourced explosions (source: 'player') must never damage the player.
ONLY player-sourced booms crack CrackedWall seals (Combat's blast scan); enemy bombs never reveal secrets.

Secret rooms stay OFF plan.rooms and off the critical path — solid-sealed at generation so stairs/key BFS invariants hold by construction; nest packs spawn at GAME level (level pressure never enters dungeon/).

Saga progress only advances when the completed quest IS the hero's current chapter (ProgressionController.advanceSaga returns null otherwise) — replays must never re-advance, re-reward the metric, or replay interludes.
Unique saga boss kits live in UNIQUE_BOSS_KITS, never in BOSS_KITS — the classic tier rotation must not shift.
New undead-flavored monsters get `undead: true` so Turn Undead scales for free; new splitters use `splitsInto` (never hardcode ids in Combat).
Floor 1 stays gentle: slime/skeleton/fire-beetle only (pinned by generator + bestiary tests).

v5 Wave E — gameplay reads ability-score DELTAS vs the class base (statModDeltas, floored at 0): a flat-base hero must play bit-for-bit like the pre-stats game (the progression.test maxHp===18 pin is that contract — never 'fix' it by passing deltas).
v5 Wave E — SavedHero.scores clamp to [class base, 18] in sanitize; the field is `scores`, never to be confused with hero.stats (the expedition record).
v5 Wave E — create() rolls scores AFTER the name pick; never reorder the rng stream.

v5 Wave E — stat picks never increment sessionBoons (boons_chosen stays semantically boons); milestone stat cards appear only when REACHING levels 3/6/9 (tests that draft at level 2 stay all-boon/spell).
v5 Wave F — hero.equipment/hero.stash are written ONLY by Inventory.bankOnVictory and town-mode pack edits; the death path must never touch them (that guarantee IS the items-lost-on-death rule).
v5 Wave F — item drops roll on the LIVE rng at game level (killBoss/elite/dropItemInRoom); the generator never places 'item' pickups.
v5 Wave F — blacksmith gear tracks and found equipment compose additively and stay separate systems (gear = town-forged tiers, items = found pieces); relics stay run-scoped.
v5 Wave G — storyStage is PURE and STATELESS (level + saga progress only); rumors must never require a new save field.

v5 Wave G — THE UNDERSCRIBE lives in UNIQUE_BOSS_KITS only; a meta saga carries meta:true and stays hidden (board AND sheet) until metaUnlocked — its chapters advance through the SAME advanceSaga path (replay-proof for free).
v5 Wave G — hero.equipment-style rule for briefings: openVictory MUST clear pendingInterlude before advanceSaga so a stale departure briefing never replays as a story beat.
v5 Wave G — depart preserves arm->provisions->clear->save; loadFloor fires at the briefing's dismiss ('descend'), never before.

Wave I — HUMAN is the neutral lineage and its perk stays FORGE-TIME ONLY: a veteran hero sanitized to 'human' must play bit-for-bit as before (this extends the Wave E flat-base contract). Never give humans a play-time passive.
Wave I — demihuman statNudges stay SINGLE points (texture, never a rebalance); nudges land at the forge only, clamped 18, and consume NO rng (never reorder the name->scores stream).

Wave I — lineage passives are applied via Player.applyLineage beside applyKit at BOTH arm sites (DraftFlow.enterTown, QuestDirector.depart); a new arm site must call it too or the bloodline silently vanishes.
Wave I — the bloodline page's digits are RELEASE-ARMED; never remove the arming or a held class-pick digit auto-forges a human.

Wave J — the draft's level-band gate reads the level being REACHED (hero.level + 1 >= minLevel) and lives ONLY in ProgressionController.draftChoices; sanitize deliberately does NOT band-check (a learned page is learned — banding is a draft rule, not a save rule).
Wave J — the six Wave D pages stay minLevel 1 and every martial technique stays banded 4/6/8 (pinned by test): a fresh hero's first drafts must play exactly as before the wave.

Wave J — techniques ARE spells: they live in SPELLS with a martial classId, persist in SavedHero.spells, and count in spells_learned/spells_cast (deliberate — never split them into a parallel system or metric).
Wave J — castSpell effects reuse existing Combat verbs and the existing SoundName palette; player projectiles from spells are kind 'dagger' (friendly), never 'bolt' (hostile).

Wave K — hit-stop scales ONLY the playing sim: the single seam is updatePlaying(this.juice.simDt(dt)). Juice/shake/particles/lighting and banner/overlay timers tick on REAL dt at the top of onUpdate; BaseGame accrues gameTime BEFORE onUpdate so timePlayedMs never sees a freeze. Never scale the dt handed to BaseGame.update, never early-return onUpdate for a freeze, and never let a freeze touch town/overlay states (flow tests idle fixed frame counts there).

Wave K — juice is VIEW-ONLY: hitStop/flashLight/curtain must never gate gameplay (loadFloor stays synchronous under the curtain); enrageFlash/flash/hitFlash-style entity fields are view feedback, never logic inputs.

Wave K — new canvas drawing stays on the MAIN ctx using jest-stubbed verbs (fillRect/arc/moveTo/lineTo/stroke; gradient-free vignettes); any NEW offscreen buffer must copy Lighting's createRadialGradient feature-detect or the test canvas stub throws.

testing.philosophy: Dev tests run while BUILDING; the production CI gate stays lean (type-check, lint, 10-test release suite, build). NEVER add the dev suite to CI. No build for game waves — user playtests the live dev build.

devTests.suites: 15 suites / 190 tests — Wave K added juice.test.ts (8: unit simDt freeze/resume/cap + flash-light lifecycle + curtain ramp; through the game: a combat-path kill freezes the sim ~2 frames then thaws, banner timers keep draining during a freeze, the town sim never freezes, descending drops the curtain) with ZERO characterization/monkey changes and zero edits to prior suites. Wave J grew spells.test.ts 7 -> 13 (18-page data contract + per-class counts, band shape: casters keep exactly 3 day-one pages / martial bands exactly [4,6,8], spellNoun, band gating both ways at the draft, martial SECOND WIND cast through the game, FAN OF KNIVES 8-projectile no-ammo cast, sanitize drops a cross-class technique) with ZERO characterization/monkey changes; one conscious comment update in progression.test (a level-1 thief's draft stays training-only BECAUSE technique bands start at 4). Wave I had added lineages.test.ts (12: data contract + sanitize/clamp, demihuman forge round-trip, FAR HORIZONS vs elf roll widths, veteran-save fallback to human, the three Player passives, title-holds + digit-fall-through + resume-skips flows, DEFAULT_KIT pin) with ZERO characterization/monkey changes; conscious updates: every run-start flow now walks title -> roster -> bloodline (classes/town/sagas/spells/progression), stats' forge-total pin includes the human bonus, progression's XP expectation derives from the forged hero's WIS delta (the town.test CHA precedent). Wave G had added dm.test.ts (14: NPC data contract + rumor uniqueness, storyStage walk, metaUnlocked/visibleSagaIds, inn reachability + bar flow, briefing contract on all 15 quests, depart->briefing->descend flow, saga-name headers, stale-briefing clear on victory, meta board gating) with ZERO characterization/monkey changes (no new metric keys or inputs); conscious updates: saga count 2->3 + reward crown -> the-underscribe (sagas.test), quest count 12->15 (town.test), classes/scrolls flow tests dismiss the gate briefing with Space, secrets' generator-walk helper skips it via a state poke, sagas.test boardCtx += pickRumor. Wave F had added items.test.ts (15) + monkey KeyI; Wave E stats.test.ts (22; the maxHp===18 pin stays as the zero-delta contract). Monkey keys include KeyV/KeyG/Tab/KeyI (KeyR deliberately NOT in the monkey set so it can't retire mid-test). Prior coverage: DungeonGenerator determinism + secret rooms, characterization (manifest, 37-key metric contract, 3000-frame monkey), classes, bestiary, scrolls, progression, town, sagas, secrets, spells. jest.setup.ts clears localStorage per test — saves cannot leak.

v4Notes.saveArchitecture: Save v2 = { version: 2, characters: Partial<Record<ClassId, SavedHero>> }; SavedHero carries level/xp/boons/stats/gold/gear/provisions. v1 saves migrate on load; invalid heroes drop individually; unknown fields ignored (additive evolution). Reward-bearing state rides trusted session metrics ONLY — the local save carries no coins/unlocks.
v4Notes.goldLedgers: THREE gold numbers now: BaseGame.pickups (cumulative arcade coins, never decrement), goldBalance (run wallet, dungeon merchants, dies with the run), hero.gold (banked treasury, town shops, safe from death, filled only by VICTORY).
